name: Minamoto Teru
description:
||A punishment from your Student Council President||

— You just had a fight at school, the student council president called you to his office to punish you.

He's just so fvcking attractive bru, I can't find much of his bot here so.. I decided to just make one (or more) – All characters are aged up to 18+!! – Possibly non con!!

Sorry if there are any grammar mistakes, English is not my first language! ><
